calendar.matters:
Motion To Apportion Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Apr-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on plaintiffs' Motion to Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Dorothy Wehr, Sharon Starwas Tschann, Vincent Wehr, Robert Wehr and Kenneth Wehr, II, who were placed under oath and examined. Mr. Sarreshtehdary also appeared for plaintiff Darlene Stark who was not present at today's hearing.
John A. Stillman, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Dorothy Wehr.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court Orders that the heirs of decedent Kenneth Wehr are entitled to distribution of all net settlement funds from the underlying survival, loss of consortium and wrongful death action, in the following proportions:

Estate of Kenneth Wehr - 0%
Dorothy Wehr - 75%
Darlene Stark - 5%
Sharon Starwas Tschann - 5%
Robert Wehr - 5%
Vincent Wehr - 5%
Kenneth Wehr, II - 5%

The law firm of Brayton Purcell, LLP shall recover from the net settlement funds of $376,318.79 the sum of $1,350.00 as reasonable attorneys' fees and costs. The balance of $374,968.79 shall be disbursed to plaintiffs in accordance with the percentages set forth above. Any future net settlement funds shall be distributed in the percentages set forth above.

Order Granting Motion for Order to Distribute Settlement Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
